disasm: andeq   r0, r0, r5, lsr r1
andeq   r0, r0, sl, lsr r1
andeq   r0, r0, fp, lsr r1
push    {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, sb, lr}
pop     {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, sb, lr}
andeq   r0, r0, sl, lsr r1
andeq   r0, r0, fp, lsr r1
stmhi   r8, {r0, r3, r7, fp, pc}
andeq   r0, r0, pc, lsl r1
stmhi   r8, {r0, r3, r7, fp, pc}
